product_overview: Web application for Barbearia Igor that lets clients register, book services, pay via Pix, view appointment history and manage profiles, with an admin area for agenda and settings control.
core_goals: Allow customers to discover services and book appointments online with accurate availability checks
Provide secure authentication, profile management and persistent sessions via Supabase
Integrate Pix checkout (Asaas) to generate dynamic charges, confirm payments and handle cancellations
Give customers a searchable, paginated appointment history and tools to cancel or reschedule within policy
Provide administrators with full visibility and controls over services, operating days and the agenda

features.name: Authentication
features.description: Sign in, register, recover password and maintain session state so users can access protected flows.
user_flows: Navigate to /login -> Fill in email -> Fill in password -> Submit login form -> See home dashboard at /
Navigate to /login -> Fill in email with wrong password -> Submit login form -> See authentication error
Navigate to /cadastro -> Fill registration form with name, phone, CPF, email and password -> Submit registration -> Be authenticated and see home dashboard at /

Navigate to /recuperar-senha -> Request a recovery email -> Receive recovery link -> Open recovery link and navigate to /update-password -> Define a new password -> See confirmation and able to sign in
Navigate to /recuperar-senha -> Request a recovery email with non-existent account -> See error indicating account not found or email could not be sent

features.name: Service Booking
features.description: Browse the catalog of services, choose a service, pick a date and time and continue to booking summary.
user_flows: Navigate to /appointments/new -> Open the service catalog -> Choose a service -> Navigate to /appointments/new/datetime -> Select an available date -> Select an available time slot -> Continue to /appointments/new/summary

Navigate to /appointments/new -> Open the service catalog -> Choose a service -> Navigate to /appointments/new/datetime -> Attempt to select a disabled date (operating day or disabled_dates) -> See validation preventing selection and pick an alternative date

Navigate to /appointments/new -> Choose a service -> Navigate to /appointments/new/datetime -> Select a date that has a conflicting appointment -> See availability blocked for that time slot -> Choose another time slot

features.name: Pix Checkout
features.description: Generate Pix charges with Asaas, show QR / copia-e-cola, poll/confirm payment status and allow cancellation of unpaid charges.
user_flows: Navigate to /appointments/new/summary -> Review booking summary -> Save CPF if missing in profile -> Generate Pix payment by calling POST /api/checkout -> See QR code and copia-e-cola data -> Wait for automatic confirmation (poll) or trigger manual confirm via POST /api/checkout/confirm -> Receive confirmation and be redirected to /

Navigate to /appointments/new/summary -> Review booking summary -> Generate Pix payment -> External payment gateway returns CPF validation error or payment creation fails -> See descriptive error about payment generation -> Choose to cancel booking which calls POST /api/checkout/cancel -> See booking removed or marked cancelled

Navigate to /appointments/new/summary -> Generate Pix payment -> See QR code -> Copy Pix key or scan QR -> Manually confirm payment status -> On confirmation call POST /api/checkout/confirm -> Booking status updates to CONFIRMED

features.name: Appointment History
features.description: Paginated, filterable history of a user's appointments with status labels and actions such as cancel or open reschedule for eligible items.
user_flows: Navigate to /history -> Open history page -> Filter by period (from/to) -> Filter by service -> See filtered list and pagination controls -> Navigate between pages -> Inspect individual history items
Navigate to /history -> Open history page -> Attempt to filter with an invalid date range or page beyond totalPages -> See empty results or validation feedback and adjust filters
Navigate to /history -> Open history page -> Identify a future appointment with PENDING payment -> Cancel the pending appointment -> See appointment removed or status updated
Navigate to /history -> Open history page -> Identify a confirmed future appointment -> Start reschedule flow -> Be redirected to /appointments/reschedule

features.name: Appointment Management
features.description: List current appointments, inspect details and reschedule when allowed by operating rules.
user_flows: Navigate to /appointments -> Open appointments list -> Inspect appointment details -> Start the reschedule flow -> Navigate to /appointments/reschedule -> Pick a new valid date and available time -> Confirm the reschedule -> See appointment updated in the list

Navigate to /appointments -> Open appointments list -> Inspect appointment details -> Start the reschedule flow -> Navigate to /appointments/reschedule -> Attempt to pick a date within the forbidden window (less than allowed lead time) -> See validation preventing the reschedule and guidance about minimum notice

features.name: Profile Management
features.description: Manage personal information (name, phone, CPF), upload avatar, access support, logout and delete account.
user_flows: Navigate to /profile -> Update name, phone and CPF -> Save changes -> See profile updated confirmation and new values persisted
Navigate to /profile -> Attempt to save an invalid CPF -> See validation error preventing save and guidance to correct CPF
Navigate to /profile -> Upload an avatar image -> Save changes -> See updated avatar displayed in profile
Navigate to /profile -> Choose to permanently delete the account -> Confirm deletion -> Account is removed and user is signed out

features.name: Admin Operations
features.description: Admin dashboard, agenda and settings to view daily appointments, manage the calendar and change service or rescheduling rules.
user_flows: Navigate to /admin -> Open daily dashboard -> See ordered list of today's appointments and quick stats
Navigate to /admin -> Go to /admin/agenda -> Inspect schedule by date -> Open appointment details for any user -> Make notes or changes as allowed
Navigate to /admin -> Go to /admin/settings -> Adjust operating_days or disabled_dates -> Save settings -> See changes reflected when browsing /appointments/new/datetime availability
Navigate to /admin -> Attempt to access admin routes as a non-admin user -> See access denied or be redirected away from /admin

routes.description: Home page with greeting, next appointment summary, and entry to booking flow
User sign-in page with email and password
User registration page with name, phone, CPF, email, and password
List of user appointments with status and actions
Service selection page for new booking
Date and time selection page with availability checks
Booking summary and Pix checkout page
Appointment rescheduling page with operating day validation
Admin dashboard with daily appointments overview
Admin agenda and calendar-style appointment list
Admin settings for services, rescheduling, operating days, and disabled dates

features.name: Authentication
features.description: Allows users to sign in, register, recover password, and maintain session state
user_interactions: Fill email and password fields to sign in
Fill registration form with personal data and create an account
Define a new password after opening the recovery link

features.name: Service Booking
features.description: Lets users choose a service, date, and time for a new appointment

features.name: Pix Checkout
features.description: Generates dynamic Pix charges, displays QR code, confirms payment, and cancels unpaid charges
user_interactions: Copy Pix key or scan QR code
Cancel unpaid booking from the Pix screen

features.name: Appointment History
features.description: Shows all user appointments with pagination, filters, and status labels
user_interactions: Open reschedule flow for confirmed future appointments

features.name: Appointment Management
features.description: Lists current appointments and supports follow-up actions such as rescheduling
user_interactions: Pick a new valid date and time

features.name: Profile Management
features.description: Lets users update personal information, CPF, avatar, logout, and delete the account

features.name: Admin Operations
features.description: Gives administrators visibility and control over agenda, appointments, and system settings
user_interactions: Adjust operating days and disabled dates
Change service settings and rescheduling rules

known_limitations.issue: Frontend end-to-end login requires a valid Supabase user account and environment-backed services
known_limitations.impact: Fully automated authenticated journeys need configured credentials or seeded users

known_limitations.issue: Pix checkout depends on live external services
known_limitations.impact: Automated payment flows require reachable Asaas and valid API credentials
